project: PRJ03246 - Balance Point Control - BPC - Celle - Unknown Well - MFC_ MTT
comment: ABI Equipment collected. ETA first thing Wednesday. 27th. Modified tele cartridge will be shipped from ALT HQ on Tuesday 26th. Lenny assigned to support this job and will travel 26th - travel still to be arranged

project: PRJ03313 - Welltec - Welltec - Kazakhstan - T-108 - MFC
comment: Departed Aksai at 12:30hrs KT on Thursday 21st and arrived at Tengiz at 13:45 hrs KT on 22nd May. Equipment and logging truck has arrived outside the field too. Weather windy and exceeding working limit for the crane at the wellsite. Liaising with the wellsite supervisor regarding taking the trucks with equipment and the logging truck onto the well site.
